title: Lesson 457: 沈む, 自然, 自然...

items.gloss: to sink; to go under; to submerge; to go down (e.g. sun); to set; to descend; to feel depressed; to become subdued; to become somber
nature; natural; spontaneous; automatic; naturally; spontaneously; automatically
